welcome.intro: I'm your personal AI — built to learn how you think and get sharper over time.

capabilities.agents: I have a team of specialists that handle different kinds of thinking.
capabilities.agentsDetail: A researcher for deep questions, a coder for technical work, a writer for creative tasks, and an analyst for strategy. Your messages get routed automatically.
capabilities.memory: I also build a memory of what matters to you. Every conversation makes the next one better.

interests.prompt: One thing that helps me — what are you into?

ready.noted: Perfect. I'll keep that in mind.
ready.notedNoInterests: No worries. We'll figure it out as we go.
ready.freeMessages: You get 10 free messages to start. Ask me anything.

tagline: Fråga mig vad som helst. Jag löser resten.
